The '''Grannan''' were a [[Near-Human]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[Granna]].

Distinguishing features of the Grannan included skin cuffs that allowed them to retract their fingers and toes, respiratory sacs that allowed the breathing of [[methanogen]] and loose [[Eye/Legends|eye]] creases.

Grannan naming conventions placed the surname before the personal name.

A small community of Grannan lived on [[Polneye]] until the whole colony was wiped out by the [[Yevethan Purge]], leaving [[Plat Mallar]] as the sole survivor.
